text: Counsel filed a brief containing nonexistent cases, false quotations, and false citations generated through ChatGPT. The lawyer then asked ChatGPT whether the cases were real and relied on the chatbot's answer instead of checking legal databases.
canonical_source_conflicted: Federal reporters, legal research databases, and actual case law
mitigation_gap: No independent cite-checking against legal databases; AI self-verification was substituted for source verification; supervising attorney signed without adequate review.
reliance_or_harm: Underlying lawsuit was dismissed and counsel/firm were sanctioned.
